title: Email to a group in Monday

posts.author: bmauch (Ben Mauch)
posts.cookedHtml:
We currently have our corporate Gmails integrated to Monday.com.
In the Contacts section of Gmail we can create groups of saved individuals who belong to different groups.
I have not been successful when generating an email in Monday that it can pull in the Contact Group.
In Gmail I just need to type in the group name and it automatically pulls the relevant individuals.
